comment: Golden-corpus manifest. Sources are downloaded on demand (cached under the arxiv-to-prompt cache dir) — never committed, to respect arXiv licensing. A golden mismatch either means an extraction regression OR the paper published a new version; check `arxiv.org/abs/<id>` before re-running `pytest -m corpus --update-golden`.

papers.why: Attention Is All You Need — NeurIPS template, equations-heavy
ResNet — IEEE/CVPR two-column, older LaTeX style
GPT-3 — very long, appendix-heavy, many tables
README example — LLM jailbreak paper, listings/prompts
